name: OLMo 2 13B
archDisplay: Dense Transformer (Olmo2 arch: 40 layers, QK-norm, reordered post-norm)
note: Flagship of Ai2's fully-open Nov 2024 OLMo 2 launch; Instruct variant beats Qwen 2.5 14B Instruct on average score

results.notes: AlpacaEval (2.0); OLMo-2-13B-1124-Instruct variant. Confirmed on the live HF model card's evaluation table and independently matches the identical figure (labeled 'AE2') in the OLMo 2 Technical Report (arXiv:2501.00656) Table 7.
TruthfulQA ('TruthQA'); OLMo-2-13B-1124-Instruct variant. Confirmed on the live HF model card and matches the OLMo 2 Technical Report Table 7 ('TQA') exactly.

ARC-Challenge; OLMo 2 Technical Report ('2 OLMo 2 Furious') Table 6, base OLMo-2-13B (non-instruct) row - a cleanly labeled table with unambiguous column headers (Avg, FLOPs, MMLU, ARC-C, HSwag, WinoG, NQ, DROP, AGIEval, GSM8K, MMLUPro, TriviaQA).
HellaSwag ('HSwag'); OLMo 2 Technical Report Table 6, base OLMo-2-13B row.
WinoGrande ('WinoG'); OLMo 2 Technical Report Table 6, base OLMo-2-13B row.
MMLU-Pro ('MMLUPRO'); OLMo 2 Technical Report Table 6, base OLMo-2-13B row.
TriviaQA; OLMo 2 Technical Report Table 6, base OLMo-2-13B row.

AGIEval column, OLMo 2 Technical Report Table 6, base OLMo-2-13B row (confirmed via direct pdftotext extraction: 'OLMo 2 13B 68.3 4.6 67.5 83.5 86.4 81.5 46.7 70.7 54.2 75.1 35.1 81.9' under header 'Avg FLOP MMLU ARC-C HSwag WinoG NQ DROP AGIEval GSM8K MMLU-PRO TriviaQA'). Not previously tracked; the corresponding MMLU/DROP/GSM8K values in that same row are base-model numbers that duplicate the benchmark slug already covered by the Instruct-variant rows in the file, so those were deliberately skipped as not genuinely new (same slug already present).

verificationNotes: Release date (Nov 26 2024) confirmed via live Ai2 blog fetch. All six benchmark rows literally confirmed on the live HF Instruct model card. paramsB=13 confirmed precisely: safetensors index total 54,864,793,600 bytes / 4 bytes (fp32) = ~13.72B, rounds to 13. ctxK=4 confirmed via config.json (max_position_embeddings=4096). No changes needed.
